title: Employee goal orientation and knowledge sharing: the moderating effect of leader boundary spanning behavior
author: Myungsun Kim and Seckyoung Loretta Kim
exclusion_reason: Cross-level study where leader BSB predicts subordinate variables. Per Precedent #001, we drop subordinate variables. No substantive leader-level effect sizes remain.
